attributes.description: Port of the Grafana auto-mitamae-fleet dashboard. Reads from metrics-prometheus.collector-* (Stream T deliverable, Phase 5b). Aggregates auto-mitamae apply outcomes across the LXC fleet via Prometheus + Elastic Agent.
attributes.panelsJSON: [{"type":"lens","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"p-success"},"panelIndex":"p-success","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"title":"Hosts: succeeded","panelRefName":"panel_p-success"},{"type":"lens","gridData":{"x":16,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"p-transient"},"panelIndex":"p-transient","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"title":"Hosts: transient","panelRefName":"panel_p-transient"},{"type":"lens","gridData":{"x":32,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"p-hardfail"},"panelIndex":"p-hardfail","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"title":"Hosts: hard failing","panelRefName":"panel_p-hardfail"},{"type":"lens","gridData":{"x":0,"y":8,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"p-active"},"panelIndex":"p-active","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"title":"Hosts: active (reporting in window)","panelRefName":"panel_p-active"},{"type":"lens","gridData":{"x":16,"y":8,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"p-drift"},"panelIndex":"p-drift","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"title":"Max drift (commits)","panelRefName":"panel_p-drift"},{"type":"lens","gridData":{"x":32,"y":8,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"p-duration"},"panelIndex":"p-duration","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"title":"Max apply duration (s)","panelRefName":"panel_p-duration"},{"type":"lens","gridData":{"x":0,"y":16,"w":48,"h":14,"i":"p-per-host"},"panelIndex":"p-per-host","embeddableConfig":{"enhancements":{}},"title":"Per-host status","panelRefName":"panel_p-per-host"}]
attributes.title: Auto-mitamae Fleet (ported from Grafana)
